//: RFP_MCP — Claude Code MCP server registration for the produce-RFP pilot.
//portability: Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} (Claude Code substitutes it for the plugin's install dir) so the backend resolves WITHOUT exporting KR_RFP_BACKEND — valid for the in-repo layout where the plugin is <repo>/mcp and the backend is <repo>/backend. `cwd` is set to backend/ so anything CWD-relative resolves. The package is `rfp_mcp` (NOT `mcp`) so it never shadows the installed MCP SDK.
//vault: PILOT_VAULT_ROOT is deployment-specific (rehearsal vault vs the live RFP_PILOT_VAULT clone), so it cannot be derived from the plugin dir — export RFP_PILOT_VAULT before launch.
//reliable-setup: If the server does not connect on launch via --plugin-dir (plugin .mcp.json autoload / env substitution can vary by Claude Code version), register it directly with absolute paths: `claude mcp add rfp-pilot --scope local --env DATABASE_URL=postgresql+psycopg://app:app@localhost:5432/kr_rfp --env PILOT_VAULT_ROOT=/abs/vault --env PYTHONPATH=/abs/KR_RFP/backend -- /abs/KR_RFP/backend/.venv/bin/python -m rfp_mcp.rfp_pilot_server`
